message:
feat(freeze): enable full closure support (read/write/create)

- Add js_frozen_create_closure FFI for OP_fclosure/fclosure8
- Enable closure write opcodes (put_var_ref*, set_var_ref*)
- Fix setClosureVar to use var_refs parameter
- Update cpool support in dispatch for nested closures
- Add createClosure wrapper in zig_runtime

Closures now properly capture variables from parent scope
and nested functions can be created via fclosure opcodes.
